rationale: The cited paper appears directly relevant to the citing paper’s core positioning: the citing study explicitly says prior sales-force work focused on extrinsic rewards, and the cited study is a major field quasi-experiment on quota-bonus vs. commission incentives. Both papers center on quota-based compensation systems and heterogeneity across lower performers, making this plausibly a foundational comparison point rather than an incidental mention. With an exact DOI match (10.1509/jmr.11.0485), this pair should be kept for full relation judgment.
